statement: In every magma, Equation 1127 (`x = y * ((y * (y * z)) * z)`) implies Equation 4183 (`x * y = ((y * z) * z) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0966
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op y z)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op y z) z) y)
